commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the legacy WatchKit app-plus-extension structure with one watchOS application target, moves the existing Swift sources and framework dependencies into it, and removes extension-only signing configuration.

PR surface: Other -70. Total -70 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source-reproducible confidence: current main clearly retains the deprecated two-target WatchKit layout, and the PR provides an exact Xcode 27 build path. The original Xcode 27 diagnostic is not included, so this was not independently reproduced in the Linux checkout.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair is indicated; this PR is ready for normal iOS owner review and landing validation.

target.title: fix: migrate watch app to single-target app
target.body: ## Summary - Migrates the watch app from the deprecated WatchKit extension product to a single-target watchOS app. - Keeps the watch app bundle id and UI/runtime behavior unchanged. - Moves the existing watch Swift sources into the single watch app target. | before (Xcode 26) | after (Xcode 27) | | - | - | | | | ## Verification - XcodeGen regenerated `apps/ios/OpenClaw.xcodeproj` from `apps/ios/project.yml`. - Xcode 27.0 beta (`27A5194q`) build succeeded for `OpenClawWatchApp` on watchOS 27 simulator. - Xcode 26.5 comparison was run from `main` against the original WatchKit extension target. ## Real behavior proof Behavior addressed: Watch app still displays the same exec approval UI after migrating from WatchKit extension to single-target watchOS app. Real environment tested: `main` with Xcode 26.5 on iOS/watchOS 26.5, and this branch with Xcode 27.0 beta on iOS/watchOS 27.0. Exact steps or command run after this patch: `DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode-27.0.0-beta.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project apps/ios/OpenClaw.xcodeproj -scheme OpenClawWatchApp -destination 'platform=watchOS Simulator,id=82925FF5-D0F6-42AD-B6FB-7363A914F04C' build` Evidence after fix: Xcode 27 build log ended with `BUILD SUCCEEDED`; branch proof ran with only iOS 27/watchOS 27 simulators booted (`AECE7F8E-2E33-4DF5-B39C-06CB04B0C006`, `82925FF5-D0F6-42AD-B6FB-7363A914F04C`) and the iOS/watchOS 26.5 comparison devices shut down. Observed result after fix: The migrated single-target watch app showed the same exec approval screen as the main/Xcode 26 WatchKit extension baseline: `Exec approval`, `echo Apple Review Demo`, host `Apple Review Demo Gateway`, node `apple-review-demo`, agent `main`. What was not tested: Physical Apple Watch hardware.
target.author: zats
